description: Style NotePerfect for those casual outings, these leather sandals from arrow are all you need to pamper your feet with style and comfort.Product DetailsBlack sandals with black leather straps on the midfoot and an ankle strap with a buckle closurePadded footbed with brandingUpper stitched to the outsole for durabilityRubber outsole with multi-directional lugs and a suction point on the forefootMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
